Who We Are
🌿
Facility or care team photo

"Our goal is to make every participant feel like family — safe, valued, and joyful."

— L’Aronde Care Team

A community built on
dignity & warmth

L’Aronde Adult Day Health Center is a licensed healthcare facility dedicated to providing a safe, engaging, and enriching environment for adults who need health-related services and supervision during the day.

Founded with a mission to serve our community’s most vulnerable adults, we provide a comprehensive day program that addresses medical, social, and emotional needs — giving both participants and their families complete peace of mind.

Licensed & Certified

State-licensed, meeting all healthcare standards

Individualized Plans

Care plans tailored to each participant

Daily Programs

Structured activities Monday through Friday

Family-Centered

Open communication with families always

What We Offer

Our comprehensive services

Everything your loved one needs — skilled clinical care, engaging activities, and heartfelt support — all under one caring roof.

Skilled Nursing

Medication management, wound care, vital signs monitoring, and health assessments by our licensed nurses.

01

Physical Therapy

Restore strength, balance, and mobility with individualized physical therapy programs designed around each participant.

02

Social Activities

Arts, music, games, cultural celebrations, and peer bonding for lasting mental wellness and daily joy.

03

Nutritious Meals

Healthy, balanced meals and snacks tailored to each participant's dietary and medical requirements.

04

Transportation

Safe, reliable door-to-door transportation to and from the center for all enrolled participants.

05

Mental Health Support

Counseling, cognitive activities, and emotional support to improve overall psychological wellbeing.

06

Occupational Therapy

Build independence in daily activities with hands-on occupational therapy tailored to each individual.

07

Caregiver Respite

Give family caregivers a well-deserved break every weekday while knowing their loved one is safe.

08
Why L’Aronde

The difference you
can feel

Every detail of L’Aronde has been designed with one goal: giving your loved one the best possible quality of life, every single day.

01

Certified & Licensed Staff

Our interdisciplinary team includes registered nurses, certified therapists, licensed social workers, and trained care aides — all committed to excellence in senior care.

02

Individualized Care Plans

Every participant receives a personalized plan developed in collaboration with their physician, family, and our clinical team — reviewed and updated regularly.

03

Safe & Welcoming Facility

ADA-compliant, secure entry, warm therapeutic atmosphere — designed so participants feel at home from the moment they arrive.

04

Culturally Sensitive Care

We celebrate diversity and provide culturally competent care that honors each participant’s background, language, and personal traditions.

05

Family-Centered Approach

We keep families fully informed — with regular updates, scheduled care conferences, and open communication every step of the way.

😀
Happy seniors in group activity

Our Commitment

A team that truly cares

Our interdisciplinary team works together every day to ensure each participant receives the highest standard of care — medically, emotionally, and socially.

  • Registered nurses on-site daily
  • Licensed physical & occupational therapists
  • Certified social workers & case managers
  • Activity specialists & wellness coaches
  • Trained personal care aides
